design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as the superhero Darkman from the 1991 film, utilizing disguises and combat abilities

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Hidden stage select via cheat code allows players to skip content and select boss encounters directly

progression.unlock_mechanism: Stage-based progression with sublevels and boss shooting events accessible via stage select
replayability_hooks: Hidden stage select enables non-linear access to levels
Boss shooting events as selectable encounters
Ending sequence accessible from control screen

world_building_techniques: Character-specific mechanics tied to protagonist abilities

boss_design.philosophy: Dedicated boss shooting events accessible as distinct gameplay encounters

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Darkman NES article)

data_limitations.notes: Source contains technical/archival data only; lacks comprehensive gameplay mechanics documentation, difficulty balancing details, and narrative structure analysis. Information primarily limited to hidden content and development artifacts.
missing_fields: Boss pattern types and notable boss names
